description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the docker:24 image with the docker:24-dind service and defines stages lint, build, test, security, delivery, and purge. Set a working_directory variable for each job as listed (ansible-lint uses test/ansible, bash-lint and bats use test/bash, container:build and its derivatives use test/container, java:build and java:lint use test/java-jar, node:build, node:lint and node:test use test/node/vueapp, terraform-lint and terraform-syntax-check use test/terraform, molecule uses test/ansible-role-testmolecule) and cd into that directory before running commands. In the lint stage run ansible-lint ., shellcheck *.sh, bats ., hadolint Dockerfile, mvn checkstyle:check, npm run lint, and terraform fmt -check, uploading any lint reports as artifacts. In the build stage run docker build -t $IMAGE_NAME . (caching Docker layers), npm ci && npm run build (caching node_modules), and mvn -B package, storing Docker images and compiled JARs as artifacts. In the test stage run npm test, molecule test, and collect JUnit reports; in the security stage run trivy image $IMAGE_NAME with allow_failure; in the delivery stage push the built image to the registry with docker push; and in the purge stage remove the image with docker rmi $IMAGE_NAME.
